stages.concept:
# Unit 145: 분사구문 (동시동작, 연속상황) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 분사구문의 **동시동작**과 **연속상황**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **동시동작** — ~하면서 (두 동작이 동시에)

> She sat on the sofa, **reading** a book.
> 그녀는 소파에 앉아서 책을 읽었다. (앉아 있으면서 읽음)

> He walked down the street, **listening** to music.
> 그는 음악을 들으면서 거리를 걸었다.

> She smiled, **waving** her hand.
> 그녀는 손을 흔들면서 미소 지었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **연속상황** — ~하고나서, 그리고 (동작이 연이어 일어남)

> **Finishing** his homework, he went out to play.
> 숙제를 끝내고 나서, 그는 놀러 나갔다.

> She opened the door, **finding** no one there.
> 그녀는 문을 열었는데, 아무도 없었다.

> He fell down, **breaking** his arm.
> 그는 넘어져서 팔이 부러졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 동시동작은 보통 **뒤에**, 연속상황은 **앞이나 뒤에** 분사구문이 와요.

**Q. 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 분사구문을 절로 바르게 고친 것을 고르세요.**
"She sat on the sofa, <u>reading a book</u>."
1. as she read a book ✅
2. before she read a book
3. though she read a book

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요!
'책을 읽으면서' 소파에 앉아 있었다는 '동시동작'의 의미이므로, 동시동작을 나타내는 부사절 접속사 as(또는 while)를 써서 'as she read a book'으로 표현하는 것이 맞습니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 동시동작(~하면서)과 연속상황(~하고 나서)! 분사구문이 다양하게 쓰이는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 145: 분사구문 동시동작, 연속상황 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 분사구문에서 생략된 접속사를 고르시오.
Walking along the street, I listened to music. (     )
> **정답** While (동시동작)

---

**02.** Finishing dinner, she watched TV. ?
> **정답** After (연속상황)

---

**03.** Sitting on the bench, he read a book. ?
> **정답** While (동시동작)

---

**04.** Opening the box, she found a ring. ?
> **정답** And (연속상황)

---

**05.** Lying on the bed, she talked on the phone. ?
> **정답** While (동시동작)

---

**06.** 접속사절을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
While she was cooking, she sang a song.
> **정답** Cooking, she sang a song.

---

**07.** He opened the door and went outside.
> **정답** Opening the door, he went outside.

---

**08.** While I was waiting for the bus, I read a book.
> **정답** Waiting for the bus, I read a book.

---

**09.** She finished her homework and went to bed.
> **정답** Finishing her homework, she went to bed.

---

**10.** While he was running, he listened to music.
> **정답** Running, he listened to music.

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
음악을 들으며 공부했다. (동시동작)
to music, I studied.
> **정답** Listening

---

**12.** 저녁을 먹고 TV를 봤다. (연속상황)
dinner, she watched TV.
> **정답** Finishing (Having finished)

---

**13.** 벤치에 앉아서 책을 읽었다. (동시동작)
on the bench, he read a book.
> **정답** Sitting

---

**14.** 문을 열고 밖으로 나갔다. (연속상황)
the door, he went outside.
> **정답** Opening

---

**15.** 침대에 누워서 전화를 했다. (동시동작)
on the bed, she talked on the phone.
> **정답** Lying

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
길을 걸으며 음악을 들었다. (동시동작)
Walking along the street listened I to music
> **정답** Walking / along / the / street / I / listened / to / music

---

**17.** 숙제를 끝내고 놀러 갔다. (연속상황)
Finishing homework his he went out to play
> **정답** Finishing / his / homework / he / went / out / to / play

---

**18.** 요리하면서 노래를 불렀다. (동시동작)
Cooking sang she a song
> **정답** Cooking / she / sang / a / song

---

**19.** 상자를 열고 반지를 발견했다. (연속상황)
Opening the box found she a ring
> **정답** Opening / the / box / she / found / a / ring

---

**20.** 버스를 기다리며 책을 읽었다. (동시동작)
Waiting the for bus read I a book
> **정답** Waiting / for / the / bus / I / read / a / book
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 145: 분사구문 동시동작, 연속상황 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Listening to the radio, I took notes.
I listened
If they listened
While I listened
While I listen
> **정답** While I listened

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Taking a shower, James hummed softly.
Because he takes
He takes
While he was taking
While he takes
> **정답** While he was taking

---

**03.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
He went into the room, looking around.
He went into the room, __________ he looked
around.
because
while
when
and
> **정답** and

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Taking the bus to work, she usually reads a novel.
________ she takes the bus to work, she usually reads
a novel.
And
Until
Although
As
> **정답** As

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They left Seoul, and they arrived in Busan in the
evening.
arrive in Busan in the evening
arriving in Busan in the evening
arrived in Busan in the evening
being arrived in Busan in the evening
> **정답** arriving in Busan in the evening

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
While she is watching TV, Yuna eats some snacks.
When watching TV
While watched TV
Watching TV
Being watching TV
> **정답** Watching TV, Being watching TV

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
She drank black tea, and ate cookies.
eat cookies
eating cookies
she ate cookies
ate cookies
> **정답** eating cookies

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Dave had lunch waiting for the flight.
although he waited for the flight
as he waited for the flight
if he waited for the flight
since he waited for the flight
> **정답** as he waited for the flight

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Checking the message, he answered the phone.
And he was checking the message
While he was checking the message
Although he was checking the message
Because he is checking the message
> **정답** While he was checking the message

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
We arrived at Gyeongbokgung Palace, and we started
to tour.
having started to tour
we starting to tour
starting to tour
we started to tour
> **정답** starting to tour

---

**11.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Cooking in the kitchen, my mom sang a song.
And she cooked in the kitchen,
Although she cooked in the kitchen,
If she cooked in the kitchen,
While she was cooking in the kitchen,
> **정답** While she was cooking in the kitchen,

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
방을 치우는 동안, 나는 잃어버린 사진을 찾았다.
__________ my room, I found a lost picture.
While I was cleaning
Since I was cleaning
Cleaning
Because I was cleaning
> **정답** While I was cleaning, Cleaning

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
그들은 치킨을 먹으며 야구 팀을 응원했다.
They cheered for the baseball team, __________
chicken.
but ate
while they were eating
and ate
eating
> **정답** while they were eating, eating

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
그 콘서트는 저녁 7시에 시작해서 저녁 10시에 끝난다.
The concert starts at 7 p.m., __________ at 10 p.m.
and it ends
but it ends
ending
while it ends
> **정답** and it ends, ending

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
책을 읽으면서, Emma는 소파에서 하루를 보냈다.
___________ a book, Emma spent the whole day on
the sofa.
Having read
While she was reading
Reading
While she is reading
> **정답** Reading, While she was reading

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 뒷마당에 씨앗을 심고 그것들에 물을 주었다.
She planted seeds in the backyard, ___________ on
them.
but she gives
and she watered
watering
and she waters
> **정답** and she watered, watering

---

**17.** 주어진 분사구문을 부사절로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을
찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Jacob approached me, asking me a question.
→ Jacob approached me and ask
me a question.
> **정답** approached, and, asked (he asked)

---

**18.** 주어진 분사구문을 부사절로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을
찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Listening to quiet music, Mary went to bed.
→ While she listens to quiet music,
Mary went to bed.
> **정답** While, listened

---

**19.** 주어진 부사절을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을
찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
She dropped the fork on the floor, and picked it up
quickly.
→ She dropped the fork on the floor,
picked it up quickly.
> **정답** dropped, picking

---

**20.** 주어진 부사절을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을
찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
While she was calling my name, my mom entered
the house.
→ She calling my name, my mom
entered the house.
> **정답** Calling, entered
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 145 분사구문 동시동작, 연속상황중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
While he was playing soccer, he shouted loudly .
  (     ) , he shouted loudly.
정답 Playing, soccer

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
He turned on the computer and wrote an essay.
He turned on the computer,  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 writing, an, essay

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
We climbed to the top, and watched the sun rise.
We climbed to the top of the mountain, 
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 watching, the, sun, rise

---

**04.** 주어진 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
While I was reading a book, I fell asleep.
  (     )   (     ) , I fell asleep.
정답 Reading, a, book

---

**05.** 다음 분사구문을 부사절로 고치시오.
I arrived at the library, reading a book.
I arrived at the library, and  (     )   (     )  
.
정답 I, read, a, book

---

**06.** 다음 분사구문을 부사절로 고치시오.
Watching the movie, I laughed a lot.
While  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I
laughed a lot.
정답 I, was, watching, the, movie

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 집 안에 들어와서, 모자를 벗었다.
[her, taking off, hat].
She came into the house,  (     )   (     )  
.
정답 taking, off, her, hat

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 바르게 배열하시오.
그들은 해가 지는 것을 보면서 어깨동무 했다.
힌트 (     ) the sun, watching, set
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , they put their arms
around their shoulders.
정답 Watching, the, sun, set

---

**09.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 분사구문과 괄호 안의 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 사과 하나를 먹으면서, TV 를 보았다.
힌트 (     ) eat an apple
  (     )   (     ) , he watched TV.
정답 Eating, an, apple

---

**10.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 분사구문과 괄호 안의 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 노래를 부르면서, 무대에서 춤을 추었다.
힌트 (     ) sing a song
  (     )   (     ) , she danced on the stage.
정답 Singing, a, song

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 145: 분사구문 동시동작, 연속상황 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Listening to music, I did my homework.
I listened If they listened While I listened While I listen
> 정답: While I listened

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Taking a bath, Amy hummed softly.
Because she takes She takes While she was taking While she takes
> 정답: While he was taking

---

**03.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
She went into the building, looking around.
She went into the building, __________ she looked around. because while when and
> 정답: and

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Walking to school, he usually listens to a podcast. ________ he walks to school, he usually listens to a podcast.
And Until Although As
> 정답: As

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They left Seoul, and they arrived in Incheon in the afternoon.
arrive in Incheon in the afternoon arriving in Incheon in the afternoon arrived in Incheon in the afternoon being arrived in Incheon in the afternoon
> 정답: arriving in Incheon in the afternoon

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) While she is studying math, Amy drinks some tea.
When studying math While studied math Studying math Being studying math
> 정답: Watching TV, Being watching TV

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
He drank orange juice, and ate toast. eat toast eating toast he ate toast ate toast
> 정답: eating toast

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Tom had a snack waiting for the train.
although he waited for the train as he waited for the train if he waited for the train since he waited for the train
> 정답: as he waited for the train

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Reading the email, she answered the phone.
And she was reading the email While she was reading the email Although she was reading the email Because she is reading the email
> 정답: While he was checking the message

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
We arrived at the museum, and we started the tour.
having started the tour we starting the tour starting the tour we started the tour
> 정답: starting the tour

---

**11.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Baking in the kitchen, my dad sang a song.
And he baked in the kitchen, Although he baked in the kitchen, If he baked in the kitchen, While he was baking in the kitchen,
> 정답: While she was cooking in the kitchen,

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
서랍을 정리하는 동안, 나는 잃어버린 편지를 찾았다. __________ the drawer, I found a lost letter.
While I was organizing Since I was organizing Organizing Because I was organizing
> 정답: While I was cleaning, Cleaning

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그들은 피자를 먹으며 축구 팀을 응원했다.
They cheered for the soccer team, __________ pizza. but ate while they were eating and ate eating
> 정답: while they were eating, eating

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그 축제는 오전 10시에 시작해서 오후 5시에 끝난다.
The festival starts at 10 a.m., __________ at 5 p.m. and it ends but it ends ending while it ends
> 정답: and it ends, ending

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
음악을 들으면서, Tom은 소파에서 하루를 보냈다. ___________ to music, Tom spent the whole day on the sofa.
Having listened While he was listening Listening While he is listening
> 정답: Reading, While she was reading

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그는 화단에 꽃을 심고 그것들에 물을 주었다.
He planted flowers in the garden, ___________ them. but he gives and he watered watering and he waters
> 정답: and he watered, watering

---
